title: Property Consultant - DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Property Consultant to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd:
DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd!
